# UC-15.5.3 · CCTV NVR Disk Utilization and Retention Policy Compliance

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Capacity, Compliance &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.*

---

## Description

Full arrays trigger oldest-footage purge; trending utilization schedules expansions before policy violations.

## Value

Avoids automatic deletion surprises during investigations.

## Implementation

(1) Ingest per-volume metrics. (2) Model growth rate. (3) Ticket storage team at 80%.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="nvr:diagnostic" earliest=-24h
| eval util=tonumber(coalesce(disk_util_pct, storage_used_pct, ""))
| eval days_left=tonumber(coalesce(retention_days_remaining, ""))
| where util>85 OR (isnotnull(days_left) AND days_left<7)
| stats latest(util) as disk_util_pct latest(days_left) as retention_days_remaining by nvr_name volume_id
```

## Visualization

Gauge utilization; forecast line.

## Known False Positives

Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.

## References

- [ONVIF — Open Network Video Interface Forum](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
